response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:26: Static intro screen. No vocal music detected. 2. 02:26-04:47: Performance of 'KING' by Kanaria. Identified by audio. Performer is Otonose Kanade. 3. response.global_summary: The video is a recording of a performance by Otonose Kanade titled 'BIRTHDAY LIVE 2026'. The first part is a static image holding screen, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'KING' by Kanaria.
